DESCRIPTION: Generic Record Header

FIELD: Quality of MDR has been degraded from nominal due to a processing degradation.
LINE OF 50 KM RES NODES and associated data

DESCRIPTION: UTC time of line of 50 km nodes
Azimuth angle bearing of nadir track velocity

FIELD: 50 KM RESOLUTION NODE and associated data

DESCRIPTION: 50 km node number as used in the PGF (ref AD-2]), i.e., (10 to -10) for the left swath in the left-to-right order, (-10 to 10) for the right swath in the left-to-right order, 0 corresponding to the mid swath position in both swaths.
Swath (right or left)
Latitude (-90 to 90 deg)
Longitude (0 to 360 deg)

FIELD: 50 KM RESOLUTION TRIPLET COMPONENT and associated data

DESCRIPTION: Smoothed to 50 km spatial resolution triplet (fore, mid, aft) sigma zero values
Smoothed to 50 km spatial resolution triplet (fore, mid, aft) kp values (values between 0 and 1)
Smoothed to 50 km spatial resolution triplet (fore, mid, aft) incidence angle values
Smoothed to 50 km spatial resolution triplet (fore, mid, aft) azimuth angle values
Flag related to the quality of the Kp estimate (ref. Ad-2)
Flag related to the usability of the averaged value (ref. Ad-2)
Flag related to the use of measurements over land in the generation of averaged value (ref. Ad-2)  (value between 0 and 1)
WARP-NRT version number
Parameters database version
Soil Moisture (0 to 100%)
Estimated Soil Moisture Error %
Extrapolated Sigma0 backscatter at 40 degrees incidence angle
Estimated Error in Extrapolated Sigma Zero backscatter at 40 degrees incidence angle
Slope at 40 degrees incidence angle
Estimated error in the slope at 40 degrees incidence angle
Soil Moisture sensitivity
Dry backscatter
Wet backscatter
Mean surface soil moisture (0 to 100%)
Rainfall contamination flag (0 to 100, zero meaning no rain contamination, 100 meaning full rain contamination)
Correction flags
Processing flags
Aggregated quality flag. Equal to the maximum value of fields 36,37,38 & 39
Flag indicating probability of presence of snow cover
Flag indicating probability of frozen soil
Flag indicating the fraction of inundation and wetland areas. Zero  means no innudation or wetland areas present
Flag indicating the topographical complexity (equal to the normalised standard deviation of the elevation). Zero values mean flat, higher values mean complex topography
